lessons: Rate-completeness audit found the bituach-leumi-rates.md reference stated the age-based employee NI rates WRONG ('Under 18: Reduced rates', 'Over retirement: Reduced rates, no health tax') instead of the real 0% (under-18 + pensioner) / 3.93%-10.03% (67-70 deferring) / 3.23%-5.17% (disability). The net-salary tool inherited this and over-charged pensioners/minors. Replaced with the verified employee age/pension table (from the official btl.gov.il employee rate page) in the reference + a flag in SKILL.md Step 3. Legacy skill: backfilled evidence.json (119 facts) from scratch and stripped pre-existing em-dashes.
